shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc 'git status --short && rg -n "subscribe|clearErrors|_subjects|name|type" src/logic src/useForm.ts src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx | head -240'

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"_subscribe|_formState|clearErrors|state.next\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts src/useForm.ts && sed -n '700,860p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts && sed -n '280,330p' src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '130,180p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1245,1280p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1320,1380p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1580,1650p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,180p' src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"const _setFormState|_setFormState =|shouldRenderFormState\\(\" src/logic/createFormControl.ts src | head -30; sed -n '80,130p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,80p' src/types/form.ts; sed -n '1,120p' src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1840,1878p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; rg -n \"type FromSubscribe|FormState.*name|UseFormSubscribe|type EventType\" src/types | head -80; sed -n '90,145p' src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.test.ts"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '400,455p' src/types/form.ts; sed -n '845,885p' src/types/form.ts; sed -n '1,40p' src/types/events.ts; sed -n '1,125p' src/__tests__/logic/shouldRenderFormState.test.ts"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '960,995p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1028,1078p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1745,1770p' src/logic/createFormControl.ts; sed -n '1,20p' src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts"

/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/jest --config ./scripts/jest/jest.config.js src/__tests__/logic/shouldRenderFormState.test.ts --runInBand && git diff --check && git diff -- src/logic/shouldRenderFormState.ts src/__tests__/useForm/subscribe.test.tsx'
